title: linum suffruticosum subsp. jimenezii
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. jimenezii, also known as Jimenez's flax or annual flax, is a subspecies of the Linum suffruticosum plant, which belongs to the Linaceae family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum subsp. jimenezii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
